---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature for Verum
labels: enhancement
---

## Which loop stage does this feature belong to?

Every Verum feature must belong to a loop stage. If you cannot answer this, the feature may be out of scope.

- [ ] [1] ANALYZE
- [ ] [2] INFER
- [ ] [3] HARVEST
- [ ] [4] GENERATE
- [ ] [5] DEPLOY
- [ ] [6] OBSERVE
- [ ] [7] EXPERIMENT
- [ ] [8] EVOLVE
- [ ] Infrastructure / Dashboard
- [ ] SDK (Python / TypeScript)

## Describe the feature

What should Verum do that it doesn't do today?

## Why is this needed?

What problem does it solve? Which users benefit?

## Proposed implementation (optional)

If you have a technical approach in mind, describe it here.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider?
